title: Frcctre Set of 6 Plastic Mixing Bowls Set, 96 Oz Neon Color Plastic Salad Bowl Hammered Serving Bowls, 10 Inch Round Large Bowls for Party, Snack, Salad, Chip, Popcorn
features: Package Includes: Set of 6 beautiful neon color 10 inch 96 Oz plastic serving bowls in blue, green, purple, 2 pcs each color.

Safe Material: The plastic salad bowls are made of unbreakable premium quality food grade polypropylene plastic, all are BPA and LEAD free. The wall of the bowl are very thick, won't crack easily, can use for a long time.

Excellent Dimensions: Frcctre extra big plastic bowl capacity are 96 Oz, with height of 4 inches, the diameter on the top is 10 inches, 4 inches on the bottom. Sturdy and durable, are perfect large mixing bowls.

Great Design: The snack bowls have three beautiful neon colors with hammered design on the bowl surface, must be a great addition to your table. Bowl's deep sides design can prevent from spilling, widen base make not tip over easily, smooth wall inner easy to clean.

Multiple Use: Our big plastic bowls sets stackable and lightweight, they are great serving bowls for indoor and outdoor use like everyday use, mixing, salad, fruit, snack, ice cream, party, camping, picnic and etc.
